name: ASRock DeskMeet X300W Barebone Mini PC - Supports AMD AM4 Socket Ryzen 2000, 3000, 4000 G-Series, 5000 and 5000 G-Series Desktop Processors up to 65W - 4x DDR4-3200MHz DIMMs up to 128GB - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - DisplayPort - HDMI - D-Sub - 500W 80+ BRONZE PSU
shortName: ASRock DeskMeet X300W Barebone Mini PC - Supports AMD AM4 Socket
description: Mini PC barebone system supporting AMD AM4 Ryzen processors with low TDP support and 500W power supply.
